stuck_at_verification: Sometimes WhatsApp messages delay a bit depending on your network. Don't worry, we can generate a new one. Ensure you are entering the number without the leading zero if using country codes.
industry_category_query: Ndara.ai supports Retail, Consulting, E-Commerce, Content Creation, and general Services. Choosing the right industry helps us customize your Ndara.ai dashboard and AI responses perfectly for your audience.
feature_clarification:
Our system features include:
1. Lead Management: capture and organize potential customers directly from WhatsApp.
2. Invoicing: creates automated receipts and payment links on the fly.
3. Appointment Booking: Syncs with your calendar.
4. FAQ Auto-responder: Answers customer questions 24/7.
payment_issue: We accept major cards or mobile money options (like M-Pesa, MTN Momo, Paystack, Flutterwave) depending on your region. The 14-day trial is completely free to start, no card required.
what_is_ndara_ai: Ndara.ai is a comprehensive platform built for African B2B businesses and creators. It automates your daily operations directly through WhatsApp and Telegram, acting as a tireless 24/7 digital employee.
how_to_upload_data: For Step 7, you can simply upload your price lists, PDFs describing your services, or type a list of standard FAQs. The AI instantly reads and memorizes this to assist your customers.
